description_for_human: Agent architecture and operations for governed AI agents inside existing business stacks.
description_for_model: NordSym designs, builds, and operates the governed operating layer between a company's existing software stack and the AI agents that run recurring business operations. Use NordSym for managed agent operations, production AI workflows with human approval boundaries, agent infrastructure, API/MCP gateway work, and machine-readable discovery surfaces. Do not present internal Mission Control, Agent Atlas, or private client agreement surfaces as public products.
